_meta.note: Every public claim must have a proof entry. Status: LIVE | PENDING | N/A

dual_signature_disbursal.claim: Milestone funds require approval from both OPERATOR_ROLE and DIRECTOR_ROLE before disbursement
dual_signature_disbursal.notes: Verifiable once contract is deployed and source-verified on Polygonscan

soulbound_nft_receipts.claim: Donation receipts are soulbound (non-transferable ERC-721 NFTs)

on_chain_metadata.claim: NFT metadata (image + attributes) stored entirely on-chain — no IPFS or centralized server dependency
on_chain_metadata.source_reference: contracts/contracts/DonationReceipt.sol — tokenURI() returns base64 data URI
on_chain_metadata.notes: Call tokenURI(1) after first donation — returns data:application/json;base64,...

no_admin_withdrawal.claim: Admin wallet cannot directly withdraw donor funds
no_admin_withdrawal.source_reference: contracts/contracts/Campaign.sol — no withdrawAll(), no adminWithdraw() function exists
no_admin_withdrawal.notes: Funds only move via disburseMilestone() which requires dual approval

non_upgradeable_contracts.claim: Contracts are not upgradeable — no proxy pattern, no admin can change contract logic
non_upgradeable_contracts.source_reference: All 3 contracts — no TransparentProxy, UUPS, or BeaconProxy patterns
non_upgradeable_contracts.notes: Source verification on Polygonscan makes this verifiable by any auditor

reentrancy_protected.claim: Donation and disbursement functions are protected against reentrancy attacks
reentrancy_protected.source_reference: contracts/contracts/Campaign.sol — ReentrancyGuard on donate() and disburseMilestone(); CEI pattern

open_source.claim: All smart contract source code is publicly available
open_source.notes: GitHub repo to be published before mainnet launch

31_tests_passing.claim: 31 automated tests covering all contract features pass on Hardhat
31_tests_passing.notes: Run: cd contracts && pnpm test — should show 31 passing
